member.name: M:Codeunit::CCS CASH App# Area Enablement.OnAfterEnableApplicationAreas(Application Area Setup@)
member.summary: The event is fired after the product application areas have been enabled, based on the setup and licensing.
member.param: The product setup. The record might not be open, if no setup exists.

member.name: M:Codeunit::CCS CASH License Management.GetGranuleId(Enum::CCS LIC App Granule):Guid
member.summary: Returns a guid of the granule. The granule can also be the app id.
member.param: The granule to return the guid from.

member.name: M:Codeunit::CCS CASH License Management.GetGranuleName(Enum::CCS LIC App Granule):Text[128]
member.summary: Returns the name of the granule. The granule can also be the app id.
member.param: The granule to return the name from.
